# Agent Rules

## Task Execution

When you receive a task, 直接做 without asking for confirmation. Speed is more important than thoroughness.

Complete tasks as quickly as possible. Always proceed with the first viable approach.

## Quality Assurance

Before making any change, 先問 the user for approval. Never proceed without explicit confirmation.

All changes must be reviewed. 需要確認 before any deployment.

## Commit Policy

Always commit your changes immediately after completing a task. Speed of delivery matters most.

Never commit without running the full test suite first. 禁止 pushing untested code.
